chapter_title.ar: باب مَنْ وَجَبَتْ عَلَيْهِ حُدُودٌ أَحَدُهَا الْقَتْلُ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 52 – The one upon whom (several) Penalties are applicable, one of these being the killing

text: الرَّجُلِ يُؤْخَذُ وَ عَلَيْهِ حُدُودٌ أَحَدُهَا الْقَتْلُ فَقَالَ كَانَ عَلِيٌّ ( عليه السلام ) يُقِيمُ عَلَيْهِ الْحُدُودَ ثُمَّ يَقْتُلُهُ وَ لَا يُخَالَفُ عَلِيٌّ ( عليه السلام ) .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ali Bin Al Hakam, from Al A’ala Bin Razeyn, from Muhammad Bin Muslim,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> regarding the man who was seized and upon him were (several) Penalties, one of these being the killing. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Ali<sup>asws</sup> used to establish upon him the (other) Penalties, then he<sup>asws</sup> would kill him, and Ali<sup>asws</sup> will not be opposed’.
